summary: STAY Pillar OS-Awareness testing complete. All 23 backend tests passed. STAY pillar correctly handles boarding, daycare, pet-friendly hotel, and home setup queries. os_context properly generates stay_context (temperament, vaccinations, social_comfort, health_flags, allergies), stay_picks (Concierge Pick Cards with concierge_always:true), and concierge_handoff (always available). Hotel picks have uses_google_places:true. Non-STAY pillars (celebrate, dine, care) continue to route correctly.

minor.issue: Generic queries like 'Where should my dog sleep at home?' route to 'advisory' instead of 'stay'. Need to use more specific keywords like 'sleeping spot', 'crate', 'bed' for STAY pillar detection.

stay_pillar_detection.home_setup_query: PASS - routes to pillar='stay' (with specific keywords)

stay_context_generation.structure: PASS - fields: temperament, vaccinations, social_comfort, health_flags, allergies, age_band, size

os_context_verified_fields.stay_context: VERIFIED - returns {temperament, vaccinations, social_comfort, health_flags, allergies, age_band, size}
os_context_verified_fields.stay_picks: VERIFIED - returns Concierge Pick Cards with title, cta, service_type, concierge_always, uses_google_places
os_context_verified_fields.concierge_handoff: VERIFIED - returns {available: true, reason: string, cta: string}

critical_code_review_comments: STAY pillar keywords correctly defined at lines 4543-4561 in mira_routes.py
get_mira_os_context() generates stay_context and stay_picks at lines 304-415
concierge_handoff always available for STAY pillar at lines 397-402
uses_google_places:true flag set on hotel_search picks at line 366
IMPORTANT: API expects 'selected_pet_id' field, not 'pet_id' - frontend integrations should use correct field name
seed_data_creation: None - used existing Mojo pet data
context_for_next_testing_agent: STAY pillar OS-awareness fully verified. All stay queries (boarding, daycare, hotel, home setup, alone time) correctly route to STAY pillar with os_context containing stay_context, stay_picks with concierge_always:true, and concierge_handoff always available. Hotel picks have uses_google_places:true. DINE pillar (tested in iteration 147) still works correctly. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_stay_pillar_os_awareness.py can be reused for regression testing. NOTE: API expects 'selected_pet_id' not 'pet_id' in chat request body.
